content.text:
<user_query>
clone this repo https://github.com/trilogy-group/alpha_community_v2/ Then create a new repo named a-c-v2 in trilogy-group. And push it to that one
</user_query>

Cloning the source repo, then creating `trilogy-group/a-c-v2` and pushing the clone there.

[REDACTED]

input.command: gh repo create trilogy-group/a-c-v2 --private --description "Clone of alpha_community_v2" 2>&1
input.description: Create new repo a-c-v2 in trilogy-group

input.command: cd /tmp/alpha_community_v2 && git remote -v && git branch -a && git tag -l | head -20
input.description: Inspect cloned repo remotes, branches, tags

content.text:
Pushing all branches and tags with a mirror clone so nothing is missed.

[REDACTED]

input.command: cd /tmp && rm -rf alpha_community_v2.git && git clone --mirror https://github.com/trilogy-group/alpha_community_v2.git alpha_community_v2.git && cd alpha_community_v2.git && git remote set-url origin https://github.com/trilogy-group/a-c-v2.git && git push --mirror
input.description: Mirror-clone and push all refs to a-c-v2

input.command: gh repo view trilogy-group/a-c-v2 --json defaultBranchRef,refs 2>&1 | head -20
input.description: Check what was pushed to new repo

input.command: gh api repos/trilogy-group/a-c-v2/branches --jq 'length' && gh api repos/trilogy-group/a-c-v2/tags --jq 'length' && gh repo view trilogy-group/a-c-v2 --json defaultBranchRef,visibility,url
input.description: Verify branches, tags, and repo metadata

input.command: echo "Source branches:" && gh api repos/trilogy-group/alpha_community_v2/branches --paginate --jq 'length' && echo "Dest branches:" && gh api repos/trilogy-group/a-c-v2/branches --paginate --jq 'length' && echo "Source tags:" && gh api repos/trilogy-group/alpha_community_v2/tags --paginate --jq 'length' && echo "Dest tags:" && gh api repos/trilogy-group/a-c-v2/tags --paginate --jq 'length'
input.description: Compare branch and tag counts source vs dest

content.text:
Done. Summary:

**Source cloned:** `https://github.com/trilogy-group/alpha_community_v2`

**New repo created:** `https://github.com/trilogy-group/a-c-v2` (private, matching the source)

**Pushed to the new repo:**
- **88 branches** (including `main` and `dev`)
- **All release tags** (v1.0.0 through v1.13.0-dev.x, etc.)

The mirror push exited with a non-zero code only because GitHub rejects `refs/pull/*` refs from mirror clones. That is expected — pull request metadata is not copied when mirroring a repo. All actual branches and tags transferred successfully; branch counts match between source and destination (88 each).

The clone lives locally at `/tmp/alpha_community_v2.git` (bare mirror) if you need it. Say if you want it checked out into the workspace or the repo visibility changed.

[REDACTED]
